metadata.description: Production-tested Claude Code skills for software engineering, debugging, and process optimization

plugins.name: root-cause-investigation
plugins.description: Dual-mode investigation framework combining Five Whys and Peeling the Onion for systematic root cause analysis

plugins.name: five-step-optimizer
plugins.description: Apply Elon Musk's Five-Step Algorithm to systematically optimize any process, system, or workflow

plugins.name: security-patterns
plugins.description: Proactive security analysis for XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, parameter logging, and OWASP top 10 vulnerabilities

plugins.name: test-plan-methodology
plugins.description: Systematic 4-phase test planning to prevent coverage blind spots in any codebase with tests

plugins.name: database-migration-termination-safety
plugins.description: Guidance on what happens when database migrations are terminated mid-execution and how to design safe recoverable migrations
